description: driver.rs: module_path().to_owned() -> borrow everywhere (module_path() returns &str); fn_name/display_name clones -> borrows (span-start and stop_with metadata both accept borrowed lifetimes; only close_with needs 'static); abi_contract: param_repr_names Vec<String> -> param_reprs: opaque(&surface.param_reprs[sid]) (Vec<ArgRepr> is 'static), body_origin/entry_abi format!("{:?}") -> opaque_debug(&body_slot.native_body.origin/.entry_abi); compile span spec_count .filter().count() -> precompute spec_count on NativeCodegenSurface at construction (raw stored state, correct by construction). terminator.rs closure_call_lowered: closure_binding_repr format!("{:?}") -> closure_binding.repr().as_str() (&'static str, IDENTICAL strings — ir_codegen_test assertions on ValueRef unaffected). prim.rs callable_entry_selected: kill O(n) closure_fn_name find+clone+format fallback -> module: opaque(env.module) (fz_ir::Module is 'static) and body_name borrow; module_path borrow. Tests: ir_codegen_test param_reprs (653/857/2694) and closure_fn_name (713) consumers move to event-time handlers that downcast &Vec<ArgRepr> (map as_str) and resolve the closure fn name from the opaque Module by fn_id.
title: native_codegen emits: borrow module_path/names, opaque reprs, stored spec_count
